text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With summer camp now over, we're all waiting for
the bus, when...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Why does it have to end?! Why can't it always be
summer camp?!
choice_data_list: I suppose because summer has to end.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh! There's still so much crazy training I wanna
do! Please don't let summer end!
choice_data_list:
Summer has to end if we're going to run in the
Swan Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: See ya later, summer! Swan Stakes, here I come!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Swan Stakes approaching, we can't let
our guard down. We'll have to bring this summer
heat into the fall!
